Select a faculty member

Each faculty member has their own separate database of grants, students, departments, and scenarios.

{{ f.name }}{% if f.slug == current %} current{% endif %}
No faculty databases yet — create one below.
New faculty member

This creates a brand-new database for this faculty member. If you attach a grant-report workbook (.xlsx), active grants and their balances are imported automatically (using today's date, a 3-year estimated start date for grants with no ledger history, and excluding already-expired awards) -- you can still add or edit grants by hand afterwards either way.

{% endblock %}
